businessPlan:
## Business Overview
DAM's Fortune Casino

**Platform Status:** Pre-launch — public access is currently held pending completion of sweepstakes model compliance transition and founder approval.

## Business Model
DAM's Fortune Casino operates as a **sweepstakes casino**, a legally compliant model widely used across the U.S. market (e.g., Chumba Casino, LuckyLand Slots, Pulsz). This model allows broad market access across most U.S. states without traditional gaming licenses.

### Dual-Currency System
- **Gold Coins (GC):** Free-play entertainment currency with no cash value. Used for casual gameplay with no purchase required.
- **Sweeps Coins (SC):** Promotional currency awarded as a bonus alongside Gold Coin packages. Redeemable for prizes and cash equivalents under official sweepstakes rules.

This structure is the legal backbone of the platform, distinguishing play from gambling under most U.S. state laws. Monetization is driven by Gold Coin package sales, with Sweeps Coins provided as a promotional bonus — not sold directly.

### Compliance Posture
All consumer-facing touchpoints — including the landing page, Email Gate, Dollar Day, and Pool Hall — have been updated to align with sweepstakes casino legal standards. Compliant messaging is consistent across all properties and includes:
- **"Play FREE. Win Real Prizes"** as the primary value framing
- Dual-currency (Gold Coins / Sweeps Coins) language replacing any direct cash/prize framing
- **"No Purchase Necessary"** legal disclosure active at point of entry

## Customer Profile
Target customers identified from business context

### Primary Demographic
The platform's social feature set is designed to attract a **younger, socially-driven audience (ages 21–35)** who value social interaction alongside gaming, are active on platforms like Snapchat, and are drawn to casual, fun environments rather than traditional solitary casino play. The premium, exclusive atmosphere of the onboarding experience also targets players who respond to **status, experience, and the thrill of access** — not just free-to-play mechanics.

### Pain Points
- Users come to DAM's Fortune Casino looking for a fun, easy way to enjoy casino-style games without friction. They want variety, quick access to the games they like, and a clear sense that the platform is giving them real value from the start.
- They're also looking for guidance: what to play, how the sign-up offer works, and how to keep coming back in a way that feels rewarding and simple.
- Socially-oriented players want a sense of community — they want to see other people on the platform, chat in real time, and share the experience with friends.

## Key Problems
- **Users come to DAM's Fortune Casino looking for a fun, easy**: Users come to DAM's Fortune Casino looking for a fun, easy way to enjoy casino-style games without friction. They want variety, quick access to the games they like, and a clear sense that the platform is giving them real value from the start.
- **They're also looking for guidance: what to play, h**: They're also looking for guidance: what to play, how the sign-up offer works, and how to keep coming back in a way that feels rewarding and simple.

## Customer Journey
## 1. USER GOALS
Users come to DAM's Fortune Casino looking for a fun, easy way to enjoy casino-style games without friction. They want variety, quick access to the games they like, and a clear sense that the platform is giving them real value from the start.  

They're also looking for guidance: what to play, how the sign-up offer works, and how to keep coming back in a way that feels rewarding and simple.

## 2. QUALIFYING QUESTIONS
**What brings you here today?**  
1. I want to explore games  
2. I want to claim the sign-up offer  
3. I need help with my account or bonus  

**What kind of experience do you want most?**  
1. Fast, casual play  
2. Classic casino favorites  
3. New games and daily rewards  

## 3. JOURNEY NARRATIVE
Users arrive with a mix of curiosity, entertainment goals, and a desire to get real value from the platform. The agent starts by asking a couple of simple questions about why they're here and what kind of games they enjoy, then quickly turns those answers into a personalized path: claim the sign-up offer, browse popular titles, or jump into a fast session. As players interact, the agent learns their favorite game types, session length, promotion sensitivity, and whether they respond better to daily reminders or one-time recommendations. That lets it refine suggestions, surface relevant bonuses, and keep the experience feeling fresh instead of generic. The agent also helps users understand how the daily reward works, what they've unlocked, and when to come back so they don't miss value. Over time, each session makes the recommendations smarter: the agent can highlight new games that match past behavior, suggest community favorites, and nudge responsible play habits.

## 4. APP SUPPORT MAP
Creation tools help users set up their profile, save favorite games, and choose preferences so the experience feels personal right away. Tracking tools show bonus progress, daily reward status, and play history, while automation tools handle reminders, streak nudges, and offer alerts so users don't miss the value they've already unlocked. Recommend creation for new users, tracking for users focused on the daily Gold Coin flow, and automation for repeat players who want the platform to keep them engaged without extra effort.

## 5. COMMUNITY OPPORTUNITIES
Users can benefit from seeing which games are trending, reading short community reviews, and learning what other players are enjoying most. Shared wins, tips, and "what to try next" insights can help newcomers discover good-fit games faster and give the entrepreneur a way to turn customer experience into social proof and helpful recommendations.

The **Live Chat Room** makes the platform feel populated and alive at all times — giving users a reason to linger, socialize, and return. The **Bar Area** serves as the primary landing room and main lobby of the platform — a social-first environment where all players arrive, orient themselves, and connect with the community before being routed to gaming destinations including the Casino Floor and Pool Hall. Together, these features transform DAM's Fortune Casino from a solitary gaming experience into a social destination.

## 6. MONETIZATION HOOK
The first transaction happens when the user realizes purchasing a Gold Coin package isn't just a spend — it's the key that unlocks Sweeps Coins, daily value, and a smoother way to enjoy the platform. The "aha" moment is when the agent shows exactly what they get: free Gold Coins to play with immediately, plus Sweeps Coins they can redeem for real prizes. The free boundary lets users browse games, play with complimentary Gold Coins, and preview how the offer works — no purchase necessary. The paid boundary unlocks larger Gold Coin packages (with bonus Sweeps Coins), the daily reward flow, and exclusive perks that make each session feel active and worth returning to. Right before someone makes their first purchase, they should clearly see: "I know what I'm getting, I understand how to use it, and this Gold Coin package gives me a full slate of play plus Sweeps Coins I can actually redeem."

## Payment Methods
DAM's Fortune Casino supports the following methods for Gold Coin package purchases:

- **PayPal** — A widely trusted digital wallet that lowers the barrier for new players unfamiliar with the platform, providing a familiar and secure way to purchase Gold Coin packages. PayPal also serves as the primary **Sweeps Coin redemption pathway** — players cash out accumulated Sweeps Coins directly to their PayPal account, completing the full buy-in → play → cash-out loop.
- **Chime** — A bank-alternative fintech option that expands access for younger and digitally-native players who may not use traditional banking.
- **Stripe** — Primary payment processing infrastructure, integrated at the platform level to support the credits/wallet system. Enables scalable Gold Coin package purchases and is the foundation for future payment features including VIP tiers, promotions, and recurring billing.

Note: Under the sweepstakes model, Sweeps Coins are not sold directly — they are awarded as a promotional bonus alongside Gold Coin purchases or through no-purchase-necessary entry methods.

## Credits & Wallet System
DAM's Fortune Casino features a built-in credits/wallet system that gives players a persistent, transparent view of their Gold Coin and Sweeps Coin balances and transaction activity directly within the app. Key components of the wallet experience include:

- **Live Balance Display** — Players see their current Gold Coin and Sweeps Coin balances at all times, creating a clear sense of value ownership and encouraging active engagement.
- **Transaction History** — A full ledger of purchases, promotional awards, and redemption activity gives players confidence and accountability over their balances.
- **Gold Coin Package Purchases** — Players can fund their wallet through supported payment methods, with Stripe serving as the primary processing layer.
- **Sweeps Coin Redemption** — Players can redeem accumulated Sweeps Coins for prizes and cash equivalents per official sweepstakes rules. Redemption is processed via **PayPal**, giving players a familiar, trusted pathway to receive winnings directly to their digital wallet.

The system is built Stripe-ready, meaning payment activation can go live without a platform rebuild. This positions DAM's Fortune Casino for rapid transition from compliance-ready to revenue-generating.

### Gold Coin Package Tiers
The platform offers tiered Gold Coin packages, including an entry-level onramp designed to minimize purchase friction for first-time buyers:

| Package | Price | Gold Coins | Sweeps Coins Bonus |
|---|---|---|---|
| Starter | $1.99 | 5,000 GC | $1.00 SC |
| *(Additional tiers)* | *TBD* | *TBD* | *TBD* |

The $1.99 Starter package is the platform's live entry-level purchase tier, positioned within the Dollar Day purchase flow. The included $1.00 SC component meets the functional threshold for sweepstakes participation, making this tier a true onramp to real-value gameplay — not merely a cosmetic or trial purchase.

## Platform Experience & Features

### Visual Design System — 8-Dimensional Aesthetic
DAM's Fortune Casino's UI is built around an **8-dimensional design language** — a hyper-geometric, multi-layered visual system that evokes depth, complexity, and a sense of existing beyond conventional space. This design identity applies across all platform touchpoints and distinguishes the experience from both traditional online casinos and standard sweepstakes platforms.

**Core Visual Principles:**
- **Deep space palette** — Dark blacks, ultra-deep purples, and midnight blues create a sense of infinite depth as the foundational canvas
- **Neon dimensional accents** — Electric blues, magentas, and cyan tones suggest overlapping planes of light and space
- **Geometric layering** — Tessellated, hypercube-inspired patterns and multi-plane visual stacking place UI elements on distinct dimensional layers
- **Translucency & depth** — Glassmorphism-style panels and layered gradients reinforce the perception of looking through space rather than at a flat screen
- **Sharp geometric typography** — Angular, precise sans-serif type treatment reinforces the mathematical and dimensional brand personality

This visual system functions as a **unifying design identity** across all mini-apps (Bouncer, The Bar, Pool Hall, Dollar Day), creating a cohesive brand signature built around depth, complexity, and a beyond-ordinary experience.

### Immersive Spatial Navigation
The platform uses an **environmental, place-based navigation model** — users experience the interface as if walking through a high-end Las Vegas hotel/office corridor, choosing destinations by approaching named doors rather than selecting from a traditional menu or dashboard. On desktop, the navigation is rendered as a **Vegas hotel corridor with brass nameplate doors**, each representing a distinct venue destination. This design approach reinforces a sophisticated, upscale entertainment brand identity and differentiates the platform from conventional online casinos.

**Navigation Architecture:**
The platform follows a **social-first, gaming-secondary** hub-and-spoke flow. New users land in The Bar as their default arrival room and main lobby — a deliberate compliance-friendly funnel that establishes social identity before routing players toward gaming content. Casino Floor and Pool Hall are positioned as "back room" destinations accessible from this social hub, functioning as spaces players move into rather than land on by default.

| Destination | Role | Description |
|---|---|---|
| **The Bar** | Main lobby / default arrival room | Primary social hub — first room post-signup; jukebox, chat, arcade games, and avatar social layer |
| **Casino Floor** | Back room | Primary games lobby |
| **Pool Hall** | Back room (rebuilt) | Alternative gaming zone with betting UI and live spectator experience |
| **Dollar Day** | Destination | Sign-up offer hub and daily reward tracker |
| **Bouncer** | Entry point | Account, access, and compliance gate |

### Casino Floor — Slot Machine Experience
The **Casino Floor** is the platform's primary games lobby and houses the slot machine experience. The slot machines feature a **progressively polished animation and visual system**, with ongoing iterative upgrades to game feel, reel mechanics, win sequences, and overall visual fidelity. The design goal is a premium, immersive slot experience that feels distinctly high-quality compared to standard sweepstakes casino competitors.

**Slot Machine Polish Direction:**
- **Weighted reel deceleration** — Reels slow down with realistic momentum curves rather than stopping abruptly, creating the tactile feel of physical slot mechanics
- **Symbol snap-lock effect** — Each reel's final symbol locks into position with a distinct snap, giving the stop sequence a satisfying, mechanical feel
- **Per-symbol glow states on landing** — Individual symbols illuminate with a glow effect at the moment they land, adding visual feedback and anticipation to each reel stop
- **Tightened audio timing** — Sound cues are precisely synchronized to reel deceleration, snap-lock, and symbol glow events for a cohesive, immersive audio-visual experience
- Win celebration sequences with particle effects and visual feedback
- Visual presentation consistent with the platform's 8-dimensional deep space aesthetic

The Casino Floor is being developed with the same iterative polish philosophy applied across the platform — each cycle improving fidelity incrementally toward a flagship-quality gaming product.

### Pool Hall — Rebuilt with Spectator & Betting Experience
The **Pool Hall** has been rebuilt and repositioned as a dedicated back-room gaming destination with an expanded feature set and a progressively upgraded visual rendering standard. In addition to its existing game offerings, the Pool Hall includes:
- **Betting UI** — Players can place bets within the Pool Hall gaming context
- **Spectator Experience** — Players can watch live matches in real time and place live bets as spectators

This introduces a **peer-to-peer and event-based wagering mechanic** distinct from standard casino-style games, representing a meaningful expansion of the platform's gaming product categories.

**Pool Hall Visual Polish Direction:**
The Pool Hall table and ball rendering is being upgraded iteratively toward a premium, realistic visual standard:
- **Felt texture** — Rich, detailed cloth surface with visible fabric grain and depth
- **Ball shading & specularity** — Accurate light reflections and highlights on billiard balls for a three-dimensional, physical appearance
- **Table depth** — Layered rendering that gives the table a sense of real physical presence and dimensional weight
- **Overall rendering quality** — Each polish pass raises visual fidelity incrementally, with the long-term goal of a photorealistic pool table experience that stands out against standard sweepstakes casino competitors

The Pool Hall follows the same iterative polish philosophy applied to the Casino Floor slot machines — incremental rendering improvements each cycle building toward a flagship-quality visual product.

### Sweepstakes-Compliant Landing Page
DAM's Fortune Casino features a professionally designed landing page built to meet sweepstakes legal standards while delivering a brand-forward first impression aligned with the Vegas hotel corridor aesthetic. The landing page includes:
- **"No Purchase Necessary"** disclosure prominently integrated as a designed element
- Sweepstakes odds, void-where-prohibited, and regulatory-compliant copy built into the visual hierarchy — not added as afterthoughts
- A clear value proposition and CTA structure leading with the sign-up offer
- Cohesive visual identity consistent with the brass nameplate / upscale corridor theme

### Email Gate & Onboarding Experience
The email gate — the platform's primary conversion point and first user-facing touchpoint — is designed as a **high-energy, reward-forward entry experience** built to maximize signup rates from cold paid traffic. The visual design evokes an active casino floor atmosphere: bold, energetic, and excitement-driven, calibrated to create immediate continuity between ad creative and landing experience and reduce bounce at the moment of first contact.

**Messaging & Value Proposition:**
- **"Play FREE. Win Real Prizes"** is the primary headline at the email gate — directly answering the two questions every new visitor arrives with: *What does this cost me?* and *What do I get?*
- Copy is written to be **compelling and benefit-driven**, optimized specifically to maximize signup conversion rates from cold traffic with no prior brand familiarity
- A **Gold Coin welcome bonus offer** is surfaced as an immediate, tangible incentive to lower the psychological barrier to signup
- Framing is benefit-first and zero-friction: new players see the upside before they're asked for anything
- Both core motivators — **free gameplay and real prize potential** — are present at the very top of the funnel
- Messaging is calibrated for **cold paid traffic** with no prior brand familiarity — concrete, reward-centric, and objection-neutralizing

**Legal Age Verification Gate:**
Age confirmation is a **hard gate requirement** within the Email Gate signup flow. Users must confirm they are **21 or older** before proceeding — access is blocked entirely for those who do not confirm. This is both a legal compliance requirement and an audience integrity control, ensuring the platform is accessed exclusively by eligible adult players of legal drinking age.

**Post-Signup Onboarding Flow:**
Immediately after submitting their email and completing age verification, new players move through a structured onboarding sequence designed to establish social identity and ambient immersion before any gameplay begins:

1. **Jukebox Hero Interaction** — The jukebox is presented front and center as the first user interaction: players turn up the music, anchoring the platform's social atmosphere as the opening moment of the experience. This reduces drop-off between signup and meaningful product interaction.
2. **Avatar Creator (Character Build)** — Players build their casino persona before entering any venue space. Every new user establishes a persistent visual identity — skin tone, hair, outfit, accessories — before they ever place a chip. This is a hard requirement in the onboarding flow, not optional.
3. **The Bar (Main Lobby Arrival)** — Players land in The Bar as their default first room. The Bar functions as the onboarding hub: a social, low-pressure environment where new players orient themselves, interact with other users via the avatar presence layer, and choose where to go next.
4. **Casino Floor or Pool Hall (Back Room Destinations)** — From The Bar, players self-select into deeper gaming venues. These spaces feel earned — a deliberate sense of progression and discovery rather than an immediate drop into gambling-adjacent content.

| Stage | Experience |
|---|---|
| Email Gate | High-energy casino visuals; leads with compelling, benefit-driven copy; "Play FREE. Win Real Prizes" headline; Gold Coin welcome bonus; must confirm 21+ age to proceed |
| Post-Signup | Jukebox hero interaction (turn up the music) → Avatar creator (character build) → The Bar (main lobby / default arrival room) → Casino Floor or Pool Hall (back room destinations) |
| First Impression | Reward-forward, excitement-driven, identity-driven, and music-anchored |

### Customizable Avatar & Player Persona
Players can create and customize a unique **casino persona** through a built-in avatar builder. The avatar system is being developed **iteratively**, with each phase adding greater visual fidelity and customization depth — with the end-state goal of **life-like, photorealistic avatars** featuring an expansive library of modular customization parts.

**Avatar Customization — Phased Roadmap:**
The avatar creator is being built out incrementally. Each phase upgrades both the visual quality of avatars and the range of parts players can mix and match:

| Phase | Focus |
|---|---|
| **Current** | Foundational customization — skin tone, hair style and color, outfit, accessories |
| **Near-Term** | Enhanced animations — fluid, expressive movement that makes avatars feel alive across all venue spaces |
| **Long-Term** | Life-like avatar quality with an expansive modular parts library — facial features, body type, clothing layers, jewelry, tattoos, and more |

The destination is a character creator that rivals dedicated social gaming platforms: players should feel their avatar is a true, deeply personal representation of themselves.

**Sims-Style Avatar Presence System:**
Avatars are not static profile icons — they are **live, persistent social objects** visible across venue spaces in real time. Players can see other users' avatars present in The Bar and other shared spaces, creating a Sims-inspired sense of inhabiting a social environment alongside real people. As avatar animations are upgraded, this presence layer becomes increasingly immersive — avatars gesture, react, and move in ways that make shared spaces feel genuinely populated. This transforms the platform from a solo gaming experience into a **social destination with ambient human presence** — players aren't just account numbers, they occupy space, are visible to others, and feel the platform as populated and alive.

**Avatar Social Interactions:**
Clicking any player's avatar opens a **profile card** displaying their age, location, and gender, with direct interaction options: **wave, friend, or DM**. Players can optionally link their **Facebook account** for added identity context and social graph integration. This system creates a lightweight in-platform social graph and reinforces identity-driven engagement across sessions.

**Community Standards:**
The avatar interaction layer carries an inline community disclaimer: **"21+, no creepers, all sales final."** This sets behavioral expectations at the point of social interaction — surfacing community governance standards and a purchase protection notice precisely where social risk is highest, rather than burying them in terms of service.

The avatar creator is wired directly into the post-signup onboarding flow, ensuring every new player establishes their identity before entering the platform. The system also creates a foundation for future **premium cosmetic items** (exclusive outfits, accessories, rare parts) as an additional monetization layer — one that grows in value as the customization library expands.

### Jukebox — Canonical Universal YouTube Player
The **jukebox** is a signature platform feature anchored in The Bar and first introduced as the hero interaction in the post-signup onboarding flow. The jukebox is implemented as a **canonical, universal YouTube player** — a single persistent music experience that continues playing uninterrupted as users move between all five venue spaces (The Bar, Casino Floor, Pool Hall, Dollar Day, and Bouncer). Music does not restart or stop when navigating between rooms.

Beyond its role as an atmosphere-defining element, the jukebox operates as a **standalone tiered subscription product** — a YouTube-powered music experience with escalating access levels that add both a recurring revenue stream and a meaningful engagement and retention lever.

The jukebox subscription tiers are designed to move players from passive listeners to active participants in the platform's social atmosphere:

| Tier | Details |
|---|---|
| **Free** | Basic access — limited song selections, ads present |
| **Tiers 2–4** | *(Pricing and specific feature differentiation TBD)* — escalating perks expected to include ad-free listening, queue control, and top-tier DJ or playlist privileges |

> ⚠️ **Note:** Specific tier names, price points, and feature differentiation across tiers 2–4 are pending definition. These details need to be documented before the jukebox subscription is presented in acquisition or investor materials.

Music creates ambient atmosphere that extends session time and encourages social lingering in The Bar — making the jukebox subscription both a direct revenue line and an indirect retention driver across the platform. Because the player is universal and persistent, the music experience extends that retention effect across every venue in the casino, not just The Bar.

### Live Public Chat Room
An open, **real-time chat room** is visible and accessible to all users across the platform. This community feature makes DAM's Fortune Casino feel populated and active at any given moment, driving social proof, engagement, and return visits.

### Bar Area — Main Lobby, Arcade Games, Jukebox & Social Zone
The **Bar Area is the platform's main lobby and primary arrival room** — the default destination for all players post-signup and the hub of the platform's hub-and-spoke navigation architecture. It functions as the social heart of DAM's Fortune Casino: a casual, welcoming environment where players land, orient themselves, see and interact with other users via the Sims-style avatar presence layer, and choose where to go next — including into back room gaming destinations like the Casino Floor and Pool Hall.

The **jukebox is a signature feature of The Bar**, prominently displayed on desktop as a primary differentiator and atmosphere-defining element of the platform experience. The jukebox runs as a **universal YouTube player** — music plays continuously across all five venues without interruption. Players can hang out, chat, listen to music via the tiered jukebox subscription, and play arcade-style games including **Pinball** and **Plinko**.

Positioning The Bar as the main lobby is a deliberate design decision: new users experience a social, low-pressure environment — populated with visible avatar presence from other players — before being routed to gambling-adjacent content. This supports a compliance-friendly onboarding funnel while extending average session time and reinforcing the platform's identity as a social destination, not just a games library.

> 📝 **Note:** The Bar app (`TheBar`) is actively under development. Updates to its features, layout, or content should be reflected here as changes are finalized.

### Snapchat Friend Invites
Users can link their **Snapchat accounts** to invite friends directly into DAM's Fortune Casino. This integration leverages an existing social graph to drive **organic, peer-to-peer acquisition** — turning active users into a distribution channel and reducing dependence on paid advertising over time.

## Acquisition Strategy

### Paid Ad Creative Approach
Initial atmospheric/vibes-based ad creative ("Roadhouse Campaign") produced zero clicks and was replaced after performance data confirmed the approach was not driving action. Current strategy uses direct-response copy that leads with the sign-up offer as the primary hook — giving cold audiences an immediate, concrete reason to click before any brand familiarity is established.

Two creative angles are being tested in parallel:

- **Sign-Up Hook (Primary):** Offer-first, transactional copy that surfaces the sign-up deal in the opening line. Designed for cold audiences with no prior brand awareness. Reduces friction by making the value proposition impossible to miss.
- **Concrete Atmosphere (Secondary):** Retains the biker bar identity but replaces abstract mood language with specific, tangible details. Preserves brand personality while giving audiences something real to visualize.

Next milestone is click-through rate and cost-per-click data from both variants to determine which angle advances.

**Note:** Ad campaigns are on hold pending completion of the sweepstakes compliance transition and founder launch approval.

### Social & Organic Growth — Snapchat Integration
The **Snapchat friend invite system** creates a peer-driven acquisition loop: existing players invite friends directly from their Snapchat network, bringing in new users with built-in social context and trust. This organic channel is designed to compound over time, reducing cost-per-acquisition and building a community of players who arrived together rather than in isolation.

### Retention & Re-Engagement
A 3-stage automated re-engagement sequence targets inactive contacts, with Dollar Day serving as the win-back destination anchor:

| Stage | Timing | Message Focus |
|---|---|---|
| Stage 1 | Day 2 | Free coins reminder — return to platform |
| Stage 2 | Day 7 | Login streak highlight — engagement hook |
| Stage 3 | Day 14 | Win-back — coins still available via Dollar Day |

## AI Tool Suite
### Dollar Day
**Purpose**: Helps new players understand and claim the sign-up offer, then track the 30-day daily value it unlocks through Gold Coins and Sweeps Coins. The Dollar Day store includes a **$1.99 Gold Coin tier** as the live entry-level purchase option, and players can redeem accumulated Sweeps Coins for cash via **PayPal** directly within the flow.
**User Story**: I want to see how the sign-up offer works, make my first purchase easily at the $1.99 entry tier, and cash out my Sweeps Coins to PayPal when I'm ready.

### Game Pulse
**Purpose**: Lets players browse, save, and manage favorite casino games with community signals and personalized recommendations.
**User Story**: I want quick access to the games I like, plus smart suggestions based on what other players are enjoying.
